## Forum Financial Management Reduces Amazon Position per Latest 13F Disclosure

No actionable signal; a single 13F reduction from one institution does not establish a pattern without corroborating data.

- Forum Financial Management LP disclosed a decreased stake in Amazon (AMZN) via a 13F filing.
- Routine institutional disclosure; no size, catalyst, or strategic rationale provided.
